nodes.name: Platysteira
nodes.summary: Platysteira（Platysteira）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Brown-throated wattle-eye、White-fronted wattle-eye、Black-throated wattle-eye等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: Banded wattle-eye
nodes.summary: Banded wattle-eye（Platysteira laticincta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Banded wattle-eye。

nodes.name: Banded wattle-eye
nodes.summary: The banded wattle-eye (Platysteira laticincta) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is endemic to the Bamenda Highlands in western Cameroon. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. In particular, it likely prefers low-altitude forests with more bare ground and denser undergrowth cover. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
